examples: Even though she is young and has a lot to learn, Marge isn't a child.
Though Aunt Marge is now in the hospital, she'll soon be fit as a fiddle.
Marge Ford(ph) is one of the condo owners in this new four-story red brick building.
Likewise, Marge Kumaki, 57, a marketing and public-relations consultant who resides in Silver Spring, Md.
